label: ODUM Focus
description: Dual-axis price and odds charts with divergence signals for ODUM-sourced prediction opportunities.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file; OdumFocusBody (trading component) imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS internally.

1.1.note: Reads odumTypeFilter, setOdumTypeFilter, odumTfFilter, setOdumTfFilter via usePredictionsData().

1.3.note: ODUM instruments are market-level signals — not org-scoped by design.

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A for ODUM signal display.

1.7.note: ODUM_INSTRUMENTS in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts — OdumFocusBody trading component concern.

3.1.note: Live ✓ / paper ✓ (signal display, no order entry) / batch ✓ (historical ODUM data valid).

3.5.note: Paper mode: charts display identically — no interactive trade entry in this widget.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/setInterval in widget file; OdumFocusBody may have internal intervals — human verify.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify ODUM charts render in batch mode; 3.4 batch indicator if applicable.

4.1.note: No dead buttons in widget file.

l4.notes: Human: 4.7 — type/timeframe filter tabs inside OdumFocusBody; 4.8 — scroll at minW=4.

5.1.note: Serves PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H (ML-directed event strategy using divergence signals). Also relevant to PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M for signal identification.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify crypto/TradFi/football instruments render with divergence signals.

7.1.note: text-rose-400 replaced with text-destructive. No other hardcoded hex/rgb in widget file.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline dep anti-patterns in widget file.

8.1.note: No arbitrary font sizes in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget file delegates entirely to OdumFocusBody shared component.

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick in widget file. Human: keyboard walk of chart tabs inside OdumFocusBody.

l8.notes: Agent checks pass. Human: 8.4 keyboard + 8.5 resize at minW=4.

keepSeparate.rationale: ODUM is a distinct signal source (dual-axis divergence chart) — not coupled to market selection.

relationships.notes: Standalone signal widget; does not drive or depend on other prediction widgets.

dataContract.notes: Production: ODUM signal feed from prediction market aggregation service. Polling or SSE appropriate.

gaps: Crypto/TradFi/football instrument parity not verified end-to-end

findings.description: pred-odum-focus-widget.tsx — No loading or error guard initially.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: OdumFocusBody imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts instead of receiving from context. Context already exposes odumInstruments.
findings.fix: Refactored OdumFocusBody to accept instruments via prop (components/trading/predictions/odum-focus-tab.tsx). PredOdumFocusWidget now passes odumInstruments from usePredictionsData(). OdumFocusTab (standalone route) passes ODUM_INSTRUMENTS directly. Widget-side is now fully context-driven.
